AdditionalAttributes.description:
Mylanta 2go Antacid Double Strength Tablets provide fast relief for indigestion, heart burn, flatulence and wind pain. Lemon mint flavour.

Mylanta 2go Antacid Double Strength Tablets provide fast relief for indigestion, heart burn, flatulence and wind pain. Lemon mint flavour. Chewable tablets.

Mylanta 2Go Antacid Double Strength is used for fast relief from indigestion, heartburn, upset stomach, flatulence and wind pain. Ideal for frequent sufferers

Benefits of MYLANTA Double Strength:


    • Double strength for fast relief from indigestion, heartburn, upset stomach, flatulence and wind pain.

    • Pleasant mint flavour.



    Use this medicine to relieve the following symptoms:


      • Indigestion

      • Heartburn

      • Upset stomach

      • Flatulence

      • Wind pain

TgaAttributes.Directions:
Stop use after two weeks, except on medical advice.
Adults and Children OVER 12 years: How many: 1-2 tablets chewed after meals and half an hour before bed;
How often: 3-4 times a day. Do not exceed 12 tablets per day unless directed by your doctor.
TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings:
Do not use
? if you are hypersensitive to any of the ingredients
? within 2 hours of taking ANY other medication
? if carton seal is broken or missing, or if tablet foil is broken.

Ask your doctor before use if
  • for children under 12 years
  • you have any medical condition or are taking any other medicines ? you have been taking MYLANTA® continuously for 14 days
  • you have been vomiting
  • you have been passing blood or have black stools
  • you have kidney disease
  • you are on a magnesium restricted diet
  • you are over 50 and experiencing heartburn for the first time
  • you have unintentional weight loss
  • you are pregnant or breastfeeding
  • you have difficulty or pain swallowing
  • you have chest pain

    Caution
  • If symptoms persist, worsen, or new symptoms appear see your doctor. avoid acidic drinks
  • keep out of reach of children
  • in the event of an n overdose seek medical attention immediately.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
These Brown Rice Cakes are light, crunchy and packed full of the goodness of organically grown wholegrain Jasmine Brown Rice. No ‘nasty’ stuff added.

Jasmine rice, distinguished by its rich, lovely aroma and mild nutty flavour, is a heritage long grain, aromatic rice grown in its original form only in Thailand. The nutrient-rich paddies are traditionally farmed by families, so the rice is lovingly cared for throughout its cultivation. A ‘photo-period sensitive’ variety, jasmine rice can only be cultivated once a year. Upon harvesting, it is processed in the only organic mill in Thailand, ensuring that no adulteration of non-organic grains is possible. 

Enjoy the tasty flavour of Ceres Organics Brown Rice Cakes straight from the pack or with your favourite toppings.

Gluten free.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Grenade High Protein Bar Oreo Milk Choc is made with real Oreo pieces. Contains 20.9g protein and 1g sugar. High protein, low sugar.

Grenade’s iconic high protein, low sugar protein bars are the ultimate snack for any time of day. Triple-layered, coated in European chocolate and high in fibre, these bars are the perfect way to curb your sugar cravings, increase your protein intake and keep you going throughout the day.

The World’s first official OREO protein bars are packed with 21g of protein and just 1g of sugar. Featuring an indulgent crème layer, nougat centre and topped with real OREO pieces, this is not one to miss!

High Protein

Low Sugar
